body.title: [sprint] test_signature_map_surfaces_multiple_symbols red — repo-map drops a file's 2nd symbol
body.description:
PRE-EXISTING failure (unrelated to the router cutover; found during T-inference-migrate-consumers-cutover). tests/inference/test_repo_map_orientation.py::test_signature_map_surfaces_multiple_symbols_per_file asserts the signature map surfaces a file's SECOND matching symbol (helper_fn); the bare one-symbol-per-file list drops it. Fix the signature-map rendering to surface multiple symbols per file, or update the test if the behavior is intended.

**Test plan:** tests/inference/test_repo_map_orientation.py::test_signature_map_surfaces_multiple_symbols_per_file passes.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
